title: Violet Festival in Tourrettes/Loup | Mas du Chanoine
description: Violet Festival in Tourrettes/Loup: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.
paragraphs: At the end of February or on the first week of March, the festival "Around the Violet" takes place in Tourrettes-sur-Loup, 10 minutes drive from our guesthouse. 150 years ago, the village began to grow violet for the perfume industry. Throughout the weekend, live music, dancing, craft market, and a flower parade on Sunday afternoon.
